name: Deadweight Mutagen (Lesser)
description:
Activate 1 Interact

For 1 minute your joints loosen and bones thicken, making your body incredibly weighty and difficult to maneuver around.

Benefit You gain a +1 item bonus to Athletics checks to and , to your Fortitude and Reflex DCs against attempts to Shove or Trip you, and to saving throws against effects that attempt to force you to move or knock you .

Drawback You gain the condition and can't remove it while under the effects of the mutagen.
